prefillPrompt: Why did our CPA spike yesterday?

hero.headline: You're still pulling reports manually.
hero.headlineMuted: Toffu does it. You just ask.
hero.subhead: Connect your marketing accounts. Ask anything in Slack. Toffu pulls the data, finds the problem, and fixes it.

demo.content: Why did our CPA spike yesterday?
Pulling Meta Ads and Google Ads data for June 6 vs June 5...
Comparing campaign, ad set, and creative performance...

**CPA Spike Diagnosis, June 6**

Yesterday CPA: $118 vs prior day: $61. Spike of +93%.

**Root cause found:**

Meta Ads drove almost all of it. Specifically:
- **"Prospecting - Broad"** ad set: CPA went from $54 to $204 overnight
  - Spend held flat at $1,200 but conversions dropped from 22 to 6
  - The top creative (video, 3.2% CTR) stopped serving at 11pm due to a policy flag
  - Meta shifted budget to the backup creative (0.8% CTR) with no conversion history

Google Ads was flat: $44 CPA yesterday vs $42 prior day.

**Fix:** Resubmit the flagged creative for review and pause the backup creative until the primary is reinstated. Expected CPA recovery: same day.

Want me to pause the backup creative now?

findings.title: Every tedious marketing task. Done automatically.

items.title: Automated performance reports
items.desc: Weekly and daily reports sent to Slack without anyone touching a dashboard. Cross-channel, with recommendations, on a schedule you set.

items.title: CPA and ROAS anomaly alerts
items.desc: When something breaks, Toffu tells you the same day. Not at the end-of-week review when $10,000 is already gone.

items.title: Budget pacing alerts
items.desc: Halfway through the month and already 70% through budget? Toffu flags it and tells you which campaigns to slow down.

items.title: UTM and tracking audits
items.desc: Toffu checks every active ad for missing or broken UTMs. Broken attribution gets caught before it corrupts your reporting.

items.title: Scheduled campaign changes
items.desc: Pause campaigns on weekends, increase bids on high-intent days, rotate creatives on a schedule. Set it once, Toffu handles it.

items.title: Cross-channel spend summaries
items.desc: One message gets you total spend, conversions, and CPA across every channel. No logging in, no tab switching.

howItWorks.title: Set it up in 5 minutes. Save hours every week.

steps.title: Connect your marketing stack
steps.desc: Meta Ads, Google Ads, GA4, and more. One-click integrations. Toffu reads live data the moment you connect.

steps.title: Ask questions or set schedules
steps.desc: Ask one-off questions in Slack or set up recurring automations. Daily anomaly checks, weekly reports, mid-month pacing. Toffu runs them without a prompt.

steps.title: Toffu acts, you approve
steps.desc: When something needs fixing, Toffu tells you and asks if you want it done. One message and it's handled.

afterSection.title: What stops happening when marketing runs on autopilot
afterSection.subhead: The manual work doesn't just slow you down. It delays every decision.

items.title: No more Monday morning report building
items.desc: Toffu sends the report before you open your laptop. Formatted, cross-channel, with flags for what needs attention.

items.title: No more missed anomalies
items.desc: CPA doubled overnight. Toffu caught it at 9am. You fixed it by 9:15.

items.title: No more platform-switching
items.desc: One Slack message replaces logging into Meta, Google Ads, and GA4 separately.

faq.question: What can Toffu automate?
faq.answer: Reports, anomaly alerts, budget pacing, UTM audits, scheduled campaign changes, and cross-channel summaries. If you do it manually every week, Toffu can handle it.

faq.question: Does it work in Slack?
faq.answer: Yes. Toffu lives in Slack. Ask questions in any channel or DM, set up scheduled reports to any channel, get alerts when something breaks.

faq.question: What ad platforms does it connect to?
faq.answer: Meta Ads, Google Ads, GA4, Google Search Console, Bing Ads, LinkedIn Ads, TikTok Ads, and more.

faq.question: Can it make changes automatically or does it always ask?
faq.answer: Your choice. Toffu can ask before every action, or you can set rules for it to execute automatically. Full control over the autonomy level.

faq.question: How is this different from Zapier?
faq.answer: Zapier follows rules you write in advance. Toffu understands context. It diagnoses problems, explains what happened, and recommends the right fix based on your actual data.

finalCta.title: Right now, a campaign is underperforming and you don't know yet.
finalCta.subhead: It could have started yesterday. You'll find out at the end-of-week review. Toffu finds it today.

seo.title: Marketing Automation in Slack | Toffu
seo.description: Automate your marketing reports, anomaly alerts, and campaign changes in Slack. Toffu connects to Meta Ads, Google Ads, and GA4 and does the work automatically.
seo.ogDescription: You're still pulling reports manually. Toffu does it. You just ask.
